sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49148" key="qriambodiqu/rambos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρῐαμβοδῑθύραμβος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῠ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, epith. of Bacchus, Pratin.Lyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9010.tlg001:1:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.16</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
